<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Nodion](https://www.nodion.com) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/nodion/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "nodion"
  dnsCredentials:
    # NODION_API_TOKEN: The API token
    apiToken: ""
    # NODION_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # NODION_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # NODION_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)
    ttl: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
